results.rendered_html:
caturthaka (von caturtha)
1〉 adj.
a〉 der vierte  ŚRUT. 4 . 31 .
— b〉 ca˚ den vierten Tag wiederkehrend, τεταρταϊϰός, von Fiebern  P. 5,2,81 .  HARIV. 10555 .  SUŚR. 2,405,7 . 406,14 .
— 2〉 f. caturthikā ein best. Gewicht, = 4 Karṣa = 1 Pala  VAIDYAKAPAR. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— Vgl. cāturthaka.

results.rendered_html:
caturthaka a. The fourth.
— kaḥ A fever that returns or is repeated every four days, a quartan.
— rthikā A weight equal to four Karṣas.
